title: Sneaking Dog, Blossoming Cherry
overview: Sweet and simple Yasuna and her classmate/international assassin Sonya have a tough challenge when a dog wanders into their classroom.

title: Nunchaku Skills Bear Balloons
overview: Yasuna attempts to learn the sacred art of nunchuks just as she and Sonya encounter an escaped beast. Later, a young girl convinces the pair to play with her.

title: Cursed Psychic Rain Wrestling
overview: Yasuna tries her hand at mystic voodoo and psychic powers. A red haired girl looks to get revenge on poor Yasuna and Sonya for rejecting her from the main cast.

title: Ice Cream Scream Watermelon
overview: Hot Summer days call for ice cream, beaches and watermelon treats. The fun in the sun stops when an unknown assassin targets Sonya.

title: Buggy Festival Sea Dolls
overview: Yasuna tries to get Sonya into bug catching. Later the pair head to an outdoor festival, and a trip to the beach finds them stranded with no help in sight.

title: Navel Mechanism Paper Doll Ice
overview: Yasuna gets a sudden craving for shaved ice and enlists Agiri to help find some. Afterwards, Yasuna and Sonya visit Agiri in her house full of hidden traps.

title: Culture Beanbag Jousting Duel
overview: Yasuna tries to come up with a great idea for the culture festival, but Sonya is once again of no use, except when it comes to besting Yasuna at juggling.

title: Sticking, Strumming, Stabbing
overview: Yasuna finds herself stuck in a strange place while trying to prank Sonya. Later, the pair mess around with instruments and engage in a game of darts.

title: Fishing, Tsuchinokos and Forgotten Things
overview: Both Yasuna and Sonya have misplaced their things, and set out to search for them. They later find an enemy assassin instead.

title: Santa Icicle Snow Mantra
overview: Yasuna catches a cold after frolicking in the snow, much to Sonya’s annoyance. The girls later have a confusing Christmas party.

title: Bath Kite Rice Cake New Year’s First Dream
overview: Yasuna tries her hardest to get Sonya into making mochi with her. The pair then find themselves in a public bath together.

title: Drowsy Chocolate Injury Compress
overview: Yasuna believes that if she wraps herself in bandages, future injuries wont affect her. Sonya tries to catch up on rest, but Yasuna won’t let her.

title: Make the Kill Me and Make Me Your Baby
overview: Yasuna and Agiri hold a birthday party for Sonya without knowing her actual birthday. Later Yasuna admits to Sonya something that she worries about constantly.
